title: microtis porrifolia var. parviflora
intro: Microtis porrifolia var. parviflora, commonly known as the small-flowered onionweed or small-flowered onion orchid, is a plant species belonging to the Orchidaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of M. porrifolia var. parviflora include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive problems.
